# Assessment: non-causal established with indirect remaining support (valid fixture)

Claim c001 is a factual_event_claim, not a causal_claim. After removing the official
cluster, an indirect supporting relation remains for c001. Under the legacy support
floor that applies to non-causal claim kinds, this is sufficient to sustain
verdict_without_cluster='established'. The stricter direct-support / evidence-diversity
floors only apply to world-causal claim kinds.
